name: GeoNames allCountries
note: zip of allCountries.txt — the full GeoNames gazetteer (~12M rows, same columns as cities15000: col 1 = geonameid, col 2 = name, col 15 = population). ~400 MB zipped. The corpus-scale fuzzy run. Intentionally UNPINNED (empty sha256): GeoNames regenerates ~daily, so a pinned hash would go stale every day; the download is used as-is without content verification (see geonames-cities15000.json).
